seoTitle: How to Integrate Notion with Slack for Live Updates
metaDescription: Learn how to connect Notion and Slack so page edits trigger channel alerts and shared links unfurl into rich previews inside chat.
intro: Bridging your Notion docs with your Slack channels cuts down on the tab-switching that slows down project handoffs. This guide covers installing the official Notion app from Slack's directory, authorizing access to specific pages, and setting up notifications so your team gets pinged when a document changes. It also explains how link previews work when you drop a Notion page into a conversation.

steps.heading: Open the Slack App Marketplace
steps.body: From your workspace sidebar, launch the App Marketplace and search for Notion to find the official integration.

steps.heading: Add the app and approve permissions
steps.body: Click 'Add to Slack', review the requested data scopes, and click Allow to trigger the secure cross-platform connection.

steps.heading: Sign into Notion and select accessible pages
steps.body: You'll be redirected to log into your Notion workspace, where you can choose exactly which pages or databases the integration can access.

steps.heading: Connect a Notion page to a Slack channel
steps.body: Inside Notion, open a target page, click 'Connect To', and select the Slack channel you want to receive updates.

steps.heading: Set up real-time activity alerts
steps.body: Configure notification rules so comment updates or edits on the connected page automatically post to the linked Slack channel.

steps.heading: Test link unfurling
steps.body: Drop a Notion link into a Slack message to verify it displays as a rich preview card showing the page title and content snippet.

faq.question: Can Slack update tasks directly in Notion?
faq.answer: The integration supports bi-directional updates in some setups, letting you create or update Notion items from a Slack message, though the exact capability depends on how the connection is configured.

faq.question: Do I need to give Slack access to my entire Notion workspace?
faq.answer: No, you can restrict access to specific pages or databases during setup rather than granting access to everything.

faq.question: Why isn't my Notion link showing a preview in Slack?
faq.answer: Check that the connected Notion page has sharing enabled and that the integration has permission to access it, since restricted pages won't unfurl properly.

faq.question: Is the Notion Slack integration free?
faq.answer: The core integration is free to install, though your usage may be limited by your existing Notion and Slack plan tiers.
